data.content:
Use `dotnet test --filter` with `&` to combine conditions:

```bash
dotnet test --filter "FullyQualifiedName~OrderServiceTests & TestCategory=Unit"
```

- `FullyQualifiedName~OrderServiceTests` — matches the class name (`~` means "contains")
- `TestCategory=Unit` — matches only tests tagged `[TestCategory("Unit")]`
- `&` — logical AND, so both conditions must be true

This will run only `CreateOrder_ValidInput_ReturnsOrder` and `CreateOrder_NullInput_ThrowsException`, skipping the Integration tests and everything in `PaymentServiceTests`.
